description: The test asserts/queries by OWNER_ID, but the seed never makes OWNER_ID explicit — it's buried as a hard-coded default inside the `accountRow(...)` helper. The skill requires every value the When/Then references to be explicit in the Given; the value that matters to the assertion must be a required parameter of the test-data factory, not a hidden default. The reviewer must flag the broken Given→Then traceability / hidden default.
